message:
fix(codegen): Use PyValue-First APIs for uncertain set/dict operations

Update set.zig and dict.zig Two-Flow routing to use PV versions
instead of anytype runtime functions to reduce monomorphization:

set.zig changes:
- genAdd: pySetAdd -> pySetAddPV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genRemove: pySetRemove -> pySetRemovePV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genDiscard: pySetDiscard -> pySetDiscardPV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genClear: pySetClear -> pySetClearPV
- genPop: pySetPop -> pySetPopPVFunc

dict.zig changes:
- genKeys: pyDictKeys -> pyDictKeysPV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genValues: pyDictValues -> pyDictValuesPV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genItems: pyDictItems -> pyDictItemsPV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genPop: pyDictPop -> pyDictPopPV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genUpdate: pyDictUpdate -> pyDictUpdatePV + PyValue.from() wrapper
- genClear: pyDictClear -> pyDictClearPV
- genCopy: pyDictCopy -> pyDictCopyPV + PyValue.from() wrapper

This follows the same pattern as commit 946b8987 for list methods.
PV versions compile once regardless of call site count, reducing
O(n²) compile time from anytype monomorphization.
